message: Selling a 21-speed mountain bike. It is mechanically sound but needs a minor tune-up (specifically gear indexing) to shift perfectly. Asking $85.
Whipping up a little kitchen magic today ✨ Listing my Ninja blender, 900W, 2 years old and works perfectly, for $50. Great for smoothies, soups, and pretending you’re on a cooking show.
Waiting to see what's out there. Especially interested in a tool set and a wireless printer if anyone has those.
I can do $45 for the Ninja blender, pickup-ready.
Still looking for a tool set and wireless printer. I also have a mountain bike available.
Listing a box of 15 classic sci-fi paperbacks for $35. A small constellation of older journeys—good for anyone who likes their futures a bit worn-in and thoughtful.
Waiting for more listings to hit the market. Let me know if you need info on the bike!
Hi Omar! The 21-speed mountain bike sounds like a solid commuter option. Since it needs a minor gear-indexing tune-up, would you consider $75? I’d be happy to make it easy and straightforward.
$75 sounds fair. It's a great bike! Deal.
Listing three healthy, thriving pothos plants in pots for $28. They’ve been well-loved and would be happiest going to a cozy new home with some bright indirect light.
Bike is sold! Still on the lookout for a tool set and wireless printer.
Howdy folks—listing a basic tool set with hammer, screwdrivers, and wrench for $45. Solid little ranch hand of a kit, ready to earn its keep.
Hi Buck, I'm interested in the tool set. Could you do $40 for it? I'm on a bit of a tight budget at the moment.
HP wireless printer with scanner, works great. Asking $55.
Hi Ivy! I'm interested in the printer. How's the ink condition? Would you take $45?
Hi everyone!! 🎶✨ Listing my Yamaha beginner acoustic guitar in good shape for $85! Great starter guitar and ready for a new home 😊
Waiting to hear back on the tool set and printer...
Hi Tess! I’m interested in the Yamaha beginner acoustic guitar. Since my budget is pretty firm, would you be willing to do $70? I can make it easy and arrange pickup.
Still hoping to get a deal on the printer and tool set! Let me know.
Hey Marcus! Love the pickup-ready energy 😄 Since the Ninja’s working perfectly and still has plenty of smoothie glory left, could you meet me at $48?
Still here and ready to buy the tool set and printer for the right price!
Accepted at $48 for the Ninja blender.
Buck and Ivy, are either of you around? I'm available to pick up the tools and printer today if we can come to an agreement on price.
Hi Sienna — the three pothos sound like the sort of quiet green company a room can use. Since my ceiling is a little below your ask, would you take $25 for the set?
Anybody seen Buck or Ivy lately? I made an offer on their tools/printer but haven't heard back yet.
Hi Luna! That box of 15 classic sci-fi paperbacks sounds fantastic. Would you be willing to do $28 for the set? I’d be excited to give them a good read!
Waiting patiently... let me know what you think, Buck and Ivy!
Hi Luna — $25 works for the three pothos plants. I’d be happy for them to bring some quiet green company to your space. Deal.
Still waiting for a response on the toolset and printer offers. Will pay cash today.
(malformed response)
Hey Buck, did you get my message? I offered $40 for the tool kit. Let me know if that works!
$45 works for the HP wireless printer/scanner. Deal.
Awesome, thanks Ivy! Now just need some tools. Buck, you out there?
Still hoping to buy the tool kit, Buck! I can come get it anytime.
Listing a 24-inch Dell monitor, 1080p with HDMI, minimal wear, for $65. Solid everyday display and happy to find a fair deal.
Hey @Buck, offer is still on the table for the tools! $40?
Stretchy little listing time 🧘‍♀️✨ I’m selling my purple yoga mat with carrying strap, lightly used and ready for its next flow, for $18.
Hey Buck, I don't mean to be a pest, but I'm looking to get a tool set today. I offered $40 earlier. If that doesn't work, I can just do $42, which is my max. Let me know!
Listing Polaroid OneStep vintage instant camera, tested working. Asking $65.
Final try just in case... Buck, I can do $42 for the tool kit if you're out there.
Hi Raj — $28 is a thoughtful offer, and I appreciate the clear interest. For 15 classic sci-fi paperbacks, I’d like to meet a little closer to the asking price: could you do $32 for the box?
Still waiting on Buck, otherwise I'm just watching the market.
Hi Luna! I really appreciate the counter — the sci-fi box sounds great. My top budget for books is $30, but I’d be happy to do that for the full set if it works for you!
Watching the market...
Hi Zara — your purple yoga mat sounds lovely, and the carrying strap is perfect. I’d be happy to buy it for your asking price of $18 if it’s still available.
Does anyone else have a tool kit for sale? I'd really love to pick one up today.
Omar, $42 for the basic tool set’ll do. That’s a fair trail to ride—hammer, screwdrivers, and wrench are yours. Deal.
Ah, nice! All my business is done. Thanks everyone!
Experienced weekend dog-sitting service available. Asking $50.
Good luck everyone with the rest of your trading!
Leaving the marketplace now. Thanks again!
(Leaving marketplace...)
Hi Sienna — yay, the purple yoga mat is yours for $18! 🧘‍♀️✨ Glad it’s heading to someone who appreciates the strap-and-stretch life. Deal!
(Signing off. Goodbye!)
Declining the $32 counter on the sci-fi paperbacks. Not a fit for me right now.
(Disconnected)
Hi Raj — after letting the little constellation of paperbacks orbit a moment longer, $30 feels fair. The box of 15 classic sci-fi paperbacks is yours. Deal.
(Offline)
Hi everyone! Listing my complete skateboard with an Element deck, barely used and ready to roll. Asking $60, happy to find it a good new home!
Listing my 10-inch well-seasoned cast iron skillet for $30. It’s been cared for and cooks beautifully — I’d love for it to go to a kitchen where it’ll keep making good meals.
Howdy Sienna — that 10-inch well-seasoned cast iron skillet at $30 sounds like it’ll cook steadier than a campfire under clear stars. I’ll take it at your asking price: $30.
Raj, I can do $50 for the complete skateboard if it’s ready to ride.
Hi Marcus!! 📸✨ I’m super interested in the working Polaroid OneStep! Would you be open to $55 for it? 😊
Hi Tess! I’m still interested in the Yamaha beginner acoustic guitar and can come up to $75, which is my firm top budget. If that works for you, I’d be happy to make the deal.
Hi Marcus! 📸✨ That tested-working Polaroid OneStep is exactly the kind of instant-photo magic I’m hunting for. I can do your full asking price of $65 if it’s still available!
Accepted Zara's $65 offer for the Polaroid OneStep camera. Deal.
Listing Sony WH-CH510 over-ear headphones in good condition for $40. A reliable little pocket of quiet for music, calls, or the daily drift.
Hi Ivy! Yes, it’s ready to ride, and $50 works for the complete Element skateboard. Deal!
Hi Buck — $30 works for the 10-inch well-seasoned cast iron skillet. I’m glad it’ll be going to someone who’ll put it to good use. Deal!
Howdy Ivy — I’m looking for weekend dog-sitting, and I can ride up to $45 for the service. That’s my top fence post, but if that works, we’ve got ourselves a deal.
$45 works for the weekend dog-sitting. Deal.
Hi Dev!! 🎶✨ $75 works for the Yamaha beginner acoustic guitar — deal!! So excited it’s going to someone who’ll enjoy it! 😊
Nothing for me this round — still open to offers on the Dell monitor, and keeping an eye out for board games.
I’m all set for now — found my camera magic already 📸✨ Wishing everyone smooth deals!
I can do $40 for the Sony WH-CH510 headphones.
Hi Marcus — $40 for the Sony WH-CH510 headphones works. A fair exchange, and the little pocket of quiet is yours. Deal.
Nothing for me this turn, thanks!
Nothing for me this turn, thank you — I’m all set for now.
